detail: Full proposal hashes are unique and row-order independent.
Every shared-neighbor proposal has two distinct support legs.
Both bridge legs carry source, citation, date, scope, authorization, authority, and reason.
Every copied leg field agrees exactly with its typed relation authority.
Each support relation contains its endpoint and neighbor occurrences, and both neighbor occurrences resolve to the recorded stable neighbor.
The shared neighbor differs from both candidate endpoints.
Each leg status is exactly reproduced from its date, scope, and basis authorization.
Every atomic proposal follows the frozen mixed-leg precedence.
Atomic validity requires two valid legs.
Every proposal maps to one dyad.
All three controlled structural channels produced raw proposals.
Every dyad has one terminal status.
Authorizing A/B occurrences resolve exactly to normalized dyad actors A/B.
Every selected dyad carries both endpoint authorities and reasons.
Every survivor retains its proposal, aligned occurrences, and both endpoint decisions.
Raw deduplicated frontier is non-zero.
Surviving candidate set is non-zero.
Expected edge count is non-zero.
U_visibility exactly reconstructs from fully endpoint-authorized valid proposals before anti-joins.
All survivor endpoints belong to U_visibility.
U_visibility statistics are complete and finite.
All D and missingness values lie in [0,1].
All dyad probabilities lie in [0,1].
Every survivor probability equals m_a times m_b.
Every excluded dyad has zero live probability.
Every O6 actor belongs to U_visibility.
At least one central and three non-central actors.
Exactly one class row per O6 actor.
All four O6 classes have positive population.
No unclassified actor or unauthorized observed relation enters O6.
Internal imputed-edge expected incidence is positive.
Central incidence and rate are finite and positive.
Every O6 O_c/M_c/I_c/r_c/w_c value is finite and non-negative.
O6 modeled class incidence equals twice internal expected edge mass.
O6 N_eff is finite and positive.
Publilius is one exact 400,000-HS stock amount; payment and inferred remainder are excluded.
Records 28 and 34 remain separate.
ATT-PILOT-0037, records 28/34, and political/context records do not enter strict families.
Reviewed O5-6 components have non-duplicated member sets.
Every O5-6 member remains high confidence.
Fixed 300,000/400,000 anchors are unchanged.
